---
title: "Church Folklore; A Record of some Post-Reformation Usages in the English Church, now mostly Obsolete"
---

## Church Folklore; A Record of some Post-Reformation Usages in the English Church, now mostly Obsolete

**Author:** The Rev. James Edward Vaux
**Date:** 1894
**Imprint:** London: Griffith, Farran

### Notes

A second edition, <i>Church Folk Lore . . . Revised and Greatly Enlarged</i> (London: Skeffington, 1902), includes quotation from a letter or letters from CMY.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
